title: Will Carleton.
content:
In homely apparel one
            Clothes farming songs Will Carleton,
            But they have a manly ring
            And we his praises hearty sing.
meaning:
James McIntyre's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Will Carleton."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
